---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for SIPMan
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What field-engineering or SIP testing problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior or UI you would like.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## SIP Context

If relevant, include SIP methods, transports, codecs, NAT traversal, server
types, or diagnostic data involved.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, RFC references, or example logs are welcome when useful.
